## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] New or updated skill
- [ ] New or updated benchmark / grading
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or absolute local paths committed
- [ ] Relevant tests / benchmarks pass locally
- [ ] Docs updated (README / SKILL.md / CHANGELOG) where applicable
